title: Aegis RuntimeEvent v1
description: Normalized execution event emitted by an Aegis backend or associated host truth source.

execution_id.description: Execution identifier shared with the intent contract and receipt.

backend.description: Backend that produced or normalized this event.

seq.description: Monotonic per-execution sequence number assigned after normalization.

dropped_since_last.description: Number of events dropped or coalesced since the prior emitted event for this execution.

type.description: Normalized event class. Fields irrelevant to a given event type are represented as empty strings or zero values.

pid.description: Process identifier. Use `0` when not applicable to the event.

ppid.description: Parent process identifier. Use `0` when not applicable to the event.

comm.description: Short process or actor name. Use an empty string when not applicable.

exe.description: Resolved executable path or binary label. Use an empty string when not applicable.

path.description: Normalized file or resource path. Use an empty string when the event does not target a path.

flags.description: Compact bitfield or backend-specific flag value. Use `0` when not applicable.

dst_ip.description: Destination IP string for network events. Use an empty string when not applicable.

dst_port.description: Destination port for network events. Use `0` when not applicable.

domain.description: Queried or resolved domain name. Use an empty string when not applicable.

exit_code.description: Process exit status where available. Use `-1` when the event has no exit code.

metadata.description: Small string metadata for backend-specific normalization details. Large payloads, raw command lines, and full file contents are out of scope.
